commit_scope: Make the production API host native-first by routing ordinary Host(api.coherencycoin.com) traffic through the kernel-router, while keeping explicit higher-priority native/BML routes and Python fan-out for the tail.

local_validation.notes: Prompt guide and wellness passed on the dedicated worktree. Static deploy-path proof passed and now requires the native-first API host router. Runtime surface report measured the before-deploy public state as 22/815 kernel-served, 34 kernel-first capable, 0 kernel-first served, with https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/attention/kernel-runtime returning 404 and no X-Form-Router. Local kernel front-door preflight built the release Rust kernel, checked manifests and image packaging, proved /api/version and /api/health fan out with X-Form-Router: fanout-python, proved /api/utils/coherence_weight serves native-kernel, and proved /api/attention/kernel-runtime serves native metrics. Wellness runtime-share wording now uses the same public front-door provenance probe.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until this branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy has run yet. The before-deploy public probe intentionally remains 0 served kernel-first; after deploy, scripts/verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh must show ordinary no-header /api/attention/kernel-runtime returning 200 with X-Form-Router: native-kernel.

phase_gate.notes: Local proof is green and the change is ready for rebase, guard, commit, push, PR, CI, merge, deploy, and public verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Production Traefik will route ordinary API host traffic through the kernel-router first. Native manifest rows answer directly, explicit BML/native routes keep higher priority, and unmatched paths fan out to the existing Python API so the website and tools continue to work.
test_flows: Local kernel-router served native /api/utils/coherence_weight with X-Form-Router: native-kernel.
Local kernel-router served /api/attention/kernel-runtime with native live measurements.
Local kernel-router fanned /api/version and /api/health to Python with X-Form-Router: fanout-python.
Public runtime-surface read established the before-deploy baseline: 34 capable, 0 served, native attention route still 404.

evidence_refs: deploy/kernel-router/docker-compose.kernel-router.yml defines coherence-api-kernel-native-first for Host(api.coherencycoin.com) targeting coherence-api-kernel-canary at priority 700.
scripts/test_hostinger_deploy_form_paths.sh now fails if the native-first API host router or production-manifest service target is absent.
scripts/verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh now probes no-header /api/attention/kernel-runtime and requires X-Form-Router: native-kernel plus live metrics.
scripts/runtime_surface_report.py now derives kernel-first served count from the public front-door provenance probe and treats byte parity as evidence rather than a routing permission gate.
scripts/wellness_check.py now reads the same runtime-surface report and reports kernel-first served/capable counts without fixed pre-flip wording.
./scripts/kernel_front_door_local_preflight.sh -> PASS: native coherence_weight, native attention metrics, fanout-python version/health.
